creator: anatoly.borodin@gmail.com
text:
Hi!

This shar is incorrect - manifest file is missing. Here is the correct one:

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	www/xpi-gbutts
#	www/xpi-gbutts/pkg-descr
#	www/xpi-gbutts/files
#	www/xpi-gbutts/files/chrome.manifest
#	www/xpi-gbutts/distinfo
#	www/xpi-gbutts/Makefile
#
echo c - www/xpi-gbutts
mkdir -p www/xpi-gbutts > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - www/xpi-gbutts/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >www/xpi-gbutts/pkg-descr << 'END-of-www/xpi-gbutts/pkg-descr'
XDisplay all of your Google Services as buttons just next to your addressbar
Xor anywhere you like it!
X
XYou can go to settings to change which services should be available for you
Xas buttons. Left click on a button opens the service in the current tab,
XMIDDLE CLICK opens a new tab. If you like you can change the main appearance
Xfrom a Toolbar with all buttons you've selected to a single Dropdown Menu.
X
XPLEASE KEEP IN MIND:
X
Xadd the buttons on menu, view, toolbars, customize!
X
XWWW: http://www.soerenrinne.de/
XAuthor: Soeren Rinne
END-of-www/xpi-gbutts/pkg-descr
echo c - www/xpi-gbutts/files
mkdir -p www/xpi-gbutts/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - www/xpi-gbutts/files/chrome.manifest
sed 's/^X//' >www/xpi-gbutts/files/chrome.manifest <<
'END-of-www/xpi-gbutts/files/chrome.manifest'
X
Xoverlay	chrome://browser/content/browser.xul	chrome://gbutts/content/gbuttsOverlay.xul
Xoverlay	chrome://navigator/content/navigator.xul	chrome://gbutts/content/gbuttsOverlay.xul
Xcontent	gbutts	jar:chrome/gbutts.jar!/content/
X
Xskin	gbutts	classic/1.0	jar:chrome/gbutts.jar!/skin/
END-of-www/xpi-gbutts/files/chrome.manifest
echo x - www/xpi-gbutts/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >www/xpi-gbutts/distinfo << 'END-of-www/xpi-gbutts/distinfo'
XMD5 (xpi/gbutts-1.5.4-fx.xpi) = 8b364d02cf9268da4a8714102c8ac731
XSHA256 (xpi/gbutts-1.5.4-fx.xpi) =
b0ada74cfd5bcb8afafffe86b2b88b05c3506f1fda71dcb993366ed492813fa3
XSIZE (xpi/gbutts-1.5.4-fx.xpi) = 50894
END-of-www/xpi-gbutts/distinfo
echo x - www/xpi-gbutts/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >www/xpi-gbutts/Makefile << 'END-of-www/xpi-gbutts/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	xpi-gbutts
X# Date created:		2008-05-22
X# Whom:			Anatoly Borodin <anatoly.borodin@gmail.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	gbutts
XPORTVERSION=	1.5.4
XDISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	-fx
XCATEGORIES=	www
X
XMAINTAINER=	anatoly.borodin@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	Display all of your Google Services as buttons just next to
your addressbar
X
XXPI_ID=		{5C46D283-ABDE-4dce-B83C-08881401921C}
XXPI_NUM=	3576
XXPI_FILES=	chrome/gbutts.jar defaults/preferences/install.js \
X		install.rdf chrome.manifest
XXPI_DIRS=	chrome defaults/preferences defaults
X
X.include "${.CURDIR}/../xpi-adblock/Makefile.xpi"
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-www/xpi-gbutts/Makefile
exit


--
Mit freundlichen GrÃ¼Ãen,
Anatoly Borodin
